About Me

Engineer.
Builder.
Tinkerer.

I'm a Mechanical Engineering student at the University of California, Berkeley focused on mechanical design, prototyping, and embedded systems. My work combines CAD design, electronics, and experimental testing across robotics, ultrasonic instrumentation, and assistive technologies.

I enjoy building real systems from concept to prototype and am interested in careers in mechanical product design, robotics, aerospace systems, and advanced hardware engineering.
